hook.summary: A wooden block is slotted into a concrete wall, triggering a satisfying row-clearing explosion.
hook.visual_action: A 3D wooden block is dragged into a matching hole; the top layer of the concrete wall shatters into physics-based debris.

scene_flow: A wooden block is placed into the top-left slot of a concrete puzzle board.
The entire top row shatters into small gray fragments and falls to the bottom.
A second block is selected from the side menu and placed into a lower slot.
More concrete pieces break away, revealing the wooden structure underneath.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who find satisfaction in physics-based destruction and spatial organization.
